title: Projects Hub — projects.json schema
description: Defines the shape of each project entry in projects.json. Editors that support JSON Schema (VS Code, JetBrains, etc.) will validate and autocomplete fields automatically when the $schema reference is present in projects.json.

name.description: Display name shown on the card.

path.description: Subfolder name relative to the repo root. Must contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores — no slashes or spaces.

desc.description: Short description shown below the project name. Optional.

icon.description: A single emoji used as the card icon. Optional — defaults to 📁.

status.description: Current state of the project. Shown as a badge on the card. Defaults to 'live' if omitted.

tags.description: Optional list of category labels shown as chips on the card.
